zh.Fay-sur-Lignon, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, F: 法國奧維豪-洛易法勒-福洛德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuil於1130年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易法-素-利農時，他的父親François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuil34歲，母親Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSE25歲。他於1150年之前與Métheline de Clérieux結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1179年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuil于1130年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易法-素-利農时，他的父亲François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuil34岁，母亲Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSE25岁。他于1150年之前与Métheline de Clérieux结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1179年在他的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Faÿ
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, John Patrick, Donovan, Fergus, Kieran, Liam, Nuala.
English: nickname for a person believed to have supernatural qualities, from Middle English, Old French faie ‘fairy, witch’ (from Late Latin fata ‘fate, destiny’).
English: nickname for a trustworthy person, from Middle English, Old French fei ‘loyalty, trust’.

variants.name: Faye
meanings: English: variant of   Fay  .
French: variant of   Fay   3 or a habitational name from (La) Faye, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare   Faille   1 and   Lafaye  .
West African (mainly Senegal): from the name of the Faye clan of the Serer people, of unexplained etymology. This surname is also found among the Lebou people. Compare   Fye   3 and   Paye   5.

variants.name: Fey
meanings: English: variant of   Fay  .

French: habitational name from (Le) Fey, the name of several places in northeastern France, or a topographic name from someone living by a beech tree or beech wood, from Old French faie (from Latin fagus) ‘beech’.
German: nickname for a vagrant, from Middle High German vēhe ‘enmity, strife’.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Jourdain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: (French) See Jordan .

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuil was born in 1130, in Fay-sur-Lignon, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuil, was 34 and his mother, Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSE, was 25. He married Métheline de Clérieux before 1150. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1179, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuil est né en 1130, à Fay-sur-Lignon, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuil, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSE, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Métheline de Clérieux avant 1150. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1179, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuil 1130 in Fay-sur-Lignon, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuil 34 und seine Mutter Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSE 25. Er hat vor 1150 Métheline de Clérieux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1179 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuil è nato il nel 1130 nel Fay-sur-Lignon, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuil, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSE, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Métheline de Clérieux prima del 1150. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1179, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuilが1130年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-ロイアーファイ-スル-リグノンで生まれた時，父François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuilは34歳，母Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSEは25歳であった。1150年以前にMétheline de Clérieuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1179年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuil(이)가 1130년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 하테-로이르 파이-수-리뇰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuil(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSE(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1150년 이전 Métheline de Clérieux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1179년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuil nasceu em 1130, em Fay-sur-Lignon, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuil, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSE, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Métheline de Clérieux antes 1150. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1179, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuil родился в 1130 г. в местности феи-сур-лигнон, хауте-лоир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuil было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSE, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Métheline de Clérieux перед 1150 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1179 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume Jourdain de Faÿ de Chapteuil nació en 1130, en Fay-sur-Lignon, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, François Pons de Faÿ de Chapteuil, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Raymonde "Batârde" DE TOULOUSE, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Métheline de Clérieux antes de 1150. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1179, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
